_comment: Editable allowlist for the NIM tier auto-ranker. Andrew edits this; no code change needed. `models` is the curated probe set (do NOT dump the full ~100-model catalog here — probes cost money+time). Each op-class alias maps to the candidates eligible for it; the ranker probes only these against the live /v1/models catalog and picks the fastest that PASSES the fidelity gate.
